source: User-provided n8n screenshot of Personalization Agent output
email_subject: Exclusive Discounts Await You at Our Wine Store!
email_preview_text: Enjoy special offers tailored just for you on our finest wines.
email_body:
Hi there,

We know you appreciate a great selection of wine, and we've got something special just for you! Visit our store to enjoy exclusive promotional discounts on our premium wines. It's the perfect opportunity to stock up on your favorites or discover something new.

Don't miss out on these limited-time offers designed with your taste in mind.

Cheers,
The Wine Team
call_to_action: Visit Us In-Store for Exclusive Offers!
